zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda of Chester於1171年出生在英國爾切斯特時，她的父親Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester25歲，母親Bertrade de Montfort16歲。她和David of Scotland 8th Earl of Huntingdon至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1233年1月6日在英國亨廷格多史爾薩福崔享年62歲，埋葬在英國亨廷格多史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda of Chester于1171年出生在英国爾切斯特时，她的父亲Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester25岁，母亲Bertrade de Montfort16岁。她和David of Scotland 8th Earl of Huntingdon至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1233年1月6日在英国亨廷格多史爾薩福崔享年62岁，埋葬在英国亨廷格多史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Chester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name from the city of Chester, so called from an Old English form of Latin castra ‘legionary camp’. Use as a given name has become quite common since the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda of Chester was born in 1171, in Chester, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, was 25 and her mother, Bertrade de Montfort, was 16. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with David of Scotland 8th Earl of Huntingdon. She died on 6 January 1233, in Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Huntingdonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda of Chester est née en 1171, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Bertrade de Montfort, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec David of Scotland 8th Earl of Huntingdon. Elle est décédée le 6 janvier 1233, à Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda of Chester 1171 in Chester, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester 25 und ihre Mutter Bertrade de Montfort 16. Sie hatte mit David of Scotland 8th Earl of Huntingdon mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Januar 1233 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, England und wurde in Huntingdonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda of Chester è nata il nel 1171 nel Chester, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Bertrade de Montfort, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con David of Scotland 8th Earl of Huntingdon. Morì il 6 gennaio 1233, nel Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Huntingdonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda of Chesterが1171年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで生まれた時，父Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chesterは25歳，母Bertrade de Montfortは16歳であった。彼女はDavid of Scotland 8th Earl of Huntingdonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1233年1月6日にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアサウトリーで62歳で死去し，イギリスハンティングドンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda of Chester(이)가 1171년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertrade de Montfort(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 David of Scotland 8th Earl of Huntingdon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1233년 1월 6일 영국 헌틴그도실르 사w트리에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 헌틴그도실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England: Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda of Chester nasceu em 1171, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Bertrade de Montfort, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com David of Scotland 8th Earl of Huntingdon. Ela faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1233, em Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda of Chester родилась в 1171 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertrade de Montfort, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от David of Scotland 8th Earl of Huntingdon. Она умерла 6 января 1233 г. в местности савтри, хантингдоншир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности хантингдоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda of Chester nació en 1171, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Bertrade de Montfort, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con David of Scotland 8th Earl of Huntingdon. Murió el 6 de enero de 1233, en Sawtry, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.
